attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SMTAC.SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY   
,COALESCE(TAC.WORK_THEATER,'UNKNOWN' ) BK_SR_TAC_WORK_THEATER_CD 
,COALESCE(TAC.SR_NUMBER,-999 )  SRC_RPTD_SR_NUMBER_INT
,COALESCE(TAC.SA_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN' ) SRC_RPTD_SERVICE_CONTARCT_NUM       
,COALESCE(TAC.SRVC_LINE,'UNKNOWN' ) SR_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID
,COALESCE(TAC.SRVC_OFFERING,'UNKNOWN' ) SR_ALLOCATED_SERVICE_GROUP_ID 
,COALESCE(TAC.SRVC_CATEGORY,'UNKNOWN' ) SR_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID 
,COALESCE(TAC.HW_FAMILY,'UNKNOWN' ) SR_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID
,COALESCE(TAC.C3_CUST_THEATER,'UNKNOWN' ) C3_CUSTOMER_THEATER_NAME      
,COALESCE(TAC.C3_MARKET_SEGMENT,'UNKNOWN')  C3_CUST_MARKET_SEGMENT_NAME 
,COALESCE(TAC.COUNTRY_CODE,'UN' ) SOURCE_REPORTED_TAC_COUNTRY_CD
,COALESCE(TAC.TAC_BB_COST,0.00 ) TAC_BACKBONE_COST_USD_AMT     
,COALESCE(TAC.TBO_COST,0.00 ) TAC_THTR_BIZ_OPRTN_CST_USD_AMT
,COALESCE(TAC.TAC_OT_COST,0.00 ) TAC_OUT_TASKING_COST_AMT      
,COALESCE(TAC.OH_COST,0.00 ) TAC_OVERHEAD_COST_USD_AMT     
,COALESCE(PCT.TAC_COGS_PCT,0.00 ) TAC_WARRANTY_PCT           
,COALESCE(PCT.ADJUSTED_OH_PCT,0.00 ) TAC_ADJUSTED_OVERHEAD_PCT              
,CNTRL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,TAC_NON_OT_COST
,SR_TYPE
,CUSTOMER
,PROBLEM_CODE
,ENTRY_CHANNEL
,DELIVERY_CHANNEL
,ACOD
,INIT_SEVERITY
,CASE_WEIGHT
,COVERED_PRODUCT_FAMILY
,TBC
,RMA_FLAG
,WARRANTY_PCT
,TAC_ALLOCATED_WRTY_PCT
,SUBSCRIPTION_REFERENCE_ID
,VIRTUAL_ACCOUNT_ID
,SMART_ACCOUNT_ID           
,HYBRID_PRODUCT_FAMILY
,ENT_PRODUCT_FAMILY
,RFMTY.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE AS BK_SR_TAC_COST_FSCL_CAL_CD
,RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT AS BK_SR_TAC_COST_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT
,RFMTY.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT AS BK_SR_TAC_COST_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT
FROM $$STGDB.WI_EDW_TS_TAC_COGS TAC
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID CNTRL
ON CNTRL.FISCAL_MONTH_NAME = TAC.FISCAL_MONTH
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMTY
ON RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = CNTRL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SR_TECHNI_ASSIST_CENTER_COST SMTAC
ON (SMTAC.BK_SR_TAC_COST_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT = RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
AND SMTAC.BK_SR_TAC_COST_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT = RFMTY.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
AND SMTAC.SRC_RPTD_SERVICE_REQUEST_NUM_INT = TAC.SR_NUMBER
AND SMTAC.BK_SR_TAC_WORK_THEATER_CD = TAC.WORK_THEATER
AND SMTAC.DELIVERY_CHANNEL_NAME=TAC.DELIVERY_CHANNEL)
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CST_ADJ_OH_AND_WRNTY_PCT PCT
ON  PCT.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME = CNTRL.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME

SELECT 
SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY
,SRC_RPTD_SR_NUMBER_INT AS SRC_RPTD_SERVICE_REQUEST_NUM_INT
,COALESCE(NSR.BK_SERVICE_REQUEST_NUM_INT  ,-999 )	BK_SERVICE_REQUEST_NUM_INT
,SRC_RPTD_SERVICE_CONTARCT_NUM AS SRC_RPTD_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM
,C3_CUSTOMER_THEATER_NAME AS C3_CUST_THEATER_NAME
,C3_CUST_MARKET_SEGMENT_NAME AS C3_CUST_MARKET_SEGMENT_NAME
,SR_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID AS SRC_RPTD_PRDT_SUBGROUP_ID
,SR_ALLOCATED_SERVICE_GROUP_ID AS SRC_RPTD_ALLCTD_SERVICE_GROUP_ID
,SR_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID AS SRC_RPTD_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID
,SR_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID AS SRC_RPTD_PRDT_FAMILY_ID
,TAC_BACKBONE_COST_USD_AMT
,TAC_THTR_BIZ_OPRTN_CST_USD_AMT AS TAC_THEATER_BUSI_OPERATIONS_COST_USD_AMT
,TAC_OUT_TASKING_COST_AMT
,TAC_OVERHEAD_COST_USD_AMT
,TAC_WARRANTY_PCT
,TAC_ADJUSTED_OVERHEAD_PCT
,SOURCE_REPORTED_TAC_COUNTRY_CD AS SRC_RPTD_SR_CNTRY_CD
,BK_SR_TAC_COST_FSCL_CAL_CD
,BK_SR_TAC_COST_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT
,BK_SR_TAC_COST_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT
,BK_SR_TAC_WORK_THEATER_CD
,'N' SRC_DELETED_FLG
,ACOD AS TOTAL_ACTUAL_SPENT_COST_USD_AMT
,TAC_NON_OT_COST AS TAC_NON_OUT_TASKING_COST_USD_AMT
,SR_TYPE AS SERVICE_REQUEST_TYPE_CD
,CUSTOMER AS SRC_RPTD_CUST_NAME
,PROBLEM_CODE AS PROBLEM_CD
,ENTRY_CHANNEL AS ENTRY_CHANNEL_NAME
,DELIVERY_CHANNEL AS DELIVERY_CHANNEL_NAME
,ACOD AS ACTUAL_CASE_ON_DAYS_HRS_CNT
,INIT_SEVERITY AS INITIAL_SEVERITY_CD
,CASE_WEIGHT AS RMA_CASE_WEIGHT_PCT
,RMA_FLAG AS RMA_FLG
,SMART_ACCOUNT_ID AS SMART_ACCT_ID
,SUBSCRIPTION_REFERENCE_ID AS SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID
,TAC_ALLOCATED_WRTY_PCT AS TAC_ALLCTD_WARRANTY_PCT
,TBC AS TECHNI_SERVICE_BURDEN_COST_USD_AMT
,VIRTUAL_ACCOUNT_ID AS VIRTUAL_ACCT_ID
,WARRANTY_PCT
,ENT_PRODUCT_FAMILY AS SRC_RPTD_ENTERPRISE_PRDT_FAMILY_NAME
,COVERED_PRODUCT_FAMILY AS SRC_RPTD_COVERED_PRDT_FAMILY_ID
,HYBRID_PRODUCT_FAMILY AS SRC_RPTD_SERVICE_CONTRACT_LINE_NAME 
,SOURCE_REPORTED_TAC_COUNTRY_CD AS SRC_RPTD_SHIP_TO_ISO_CNTRY_NAME
,SR_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID AS SRC_RPTD_HW_PRDT_FAMILY_NAME
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM
,USER EDW_CREATE_USER
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DTM
,USER EDW_UPDATE_USER
,'I' ACTION_CODE
,'I' DML_TYPE   
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SR_TECHNI_ASSIST_CENTER_COST  TAC
LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SERVICE_REQUEST_TV NSR
ON (NSR.BK_SERVICE_REQUEST_NUM_INT=TAC.SRC_RPTD_SR_NUMBER_INT AND END_TV_DTM ='3500-01-01 00:00:00')
